svg.title: Aaditya Padiya — Featured Projects
svg.desc: Animated dark-theme showcase of eight featured projects by Aaditya Padiya: Nexovo Self-Healing Cloud (AIOps), TrustOCR AI (blockchain document AI), Corporate Network Infrastructure, HealthEcosystem (healthcare SaaS), EduAI (AI edtech), Real Estate ERP, AI Interview Model and Ritika Infotech, each shown as a glass card with category, description, tech chips and live status.
